series_metadata.series_title: Court - Open and Closed Case Files and UC Review Commission Hearing Recordings
series_metadata.series_description: Appeals from Higher Authority decisions. The case file may contain the following: notice of appeal to court, copy of appellants appeal, demand for transcript, copy of the Director''s file, transcript of Hearing Officer and Commission hearings, decisions of the hearing officer and the Commission, application to institute further appeal, notice of hearings, correspondence relevant to the case, decisions of the courts, and cassette audio tape recording of the hearing officer and Commission hearings.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office case is closed and in records center 3 years ; Electronic: in office 5 years case is closed
